zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Valletort於大約1090年出生在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛時，她的父親Reginald I de Valletort31歲，母親Alesia de Caus32歲。她於1109年與William Corbet Lord of Worthen在英國史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1140年在她的家鄉享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Valletort于大约1090年出生在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛时，她的父亲Reginald I de Valletort31岁，母亲Alesia de Caus32岁。她于1109年与William Corbet Lord of Worthen在英国史洛普爾華特萊斯波洛结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1140年在她的家乡享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Desmond
meanings: Transferred use of an Irish surname derived from the Gaelic byname Deasmhumhnach ‘(man from) south Munster’, an ancient Irish kingdom named after Mumhu, one of its early kings.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Valletort was born about 1090, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, her father, Reginald I de Valletort, was 31 and her mother, Alesia de Caus, was 32. She married William Corbet Lord of Worthen in 1109, in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1140, in her hometown, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Valletort est née environ 1090, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Reginald I de Valletort, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alesia de Caus, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé William Corbet Lord of Worthen en 1109, à Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1140, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Valletort um 1090 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Reginald I de Valletort 31 und ihre Mutter Alesia de Caus 32. Sie hat 1109 in Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England William Corbet Lord of Worthen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1140 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Valletort è nata il circa 1090 nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England, sua padre, Reginald I de Valletort, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Alesia de Caus, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato William Corbet Lord of Worthen nel 1109, nel Wattlesborough, Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1140, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Valletortが約1090年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウで生まれた時，父Reginald I de Valletortは31歳，母Alesia de Causは32歳であった。1109年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアワットレスボロウでWilliam Corbet Lord of Worthenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1140年に故郷で52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Valletort(이)가 대략 1090년 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Reginald I de Valletort(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alesia de Caus(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1109년 영국 슈럽실르 왓틀레스버루그h에서 William Corbet Lord of Worthen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1140년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Valletort nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Reginald I de Valletort, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alesia de Caus, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com William Corbet Lord of Worthen em 1109, em Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1140, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Valletort родилась около 1090 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Reginald I de Valletort было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alesia de Caus, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Corbet Lord of Worthen в 1109 г. в местности ваттлесбороую, шропшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1140 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Valletort nació aproximadamente 1090, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Reginald I de Valletort, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alesia de Caus, tenía 32 años. Se casó con William Corbet Lord of Worthen en 1109, en Wattlesborough, Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1140, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años.
